title: phlegmariurus taiwanensis
intro: Phlegmariurus taiwanensis, also known as the Taiwan forked polypody, is a species of evergreen epiphytic fern native to Taiwan. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and promoting digestion. In traditional herbal medicine, Phlegmariurus taiwanensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
